title: cyclosorus glandulosus
intro: Cyclosorus glandulosus, also known as the hairy cyclosorus fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the genus Cyclosorus in the family Thelypteridaceae. The plant is rich in medicinal properties, particularly its leaves, which have been used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions. The leaves of Cyclosorus glandulosus have been found to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help to reduce swelling and protect against cell damage. The plant can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to alleviate symptoms of fever, cough, and sore throat.
